fixes.origin:
id_blob = ",".join(ids)
sql_text = (
    "SELECT id, customer_id, total, status "
    "FROM invoices "
    "WHERE id IN (" + id_blob + ") "
    "ORDER BY id ASC"
)

cur.execute(sql_text)
fixes.replacement:
placeholders = ",".join(["%s"] * len(ids))
sql_text = (
    "SELECT id, customer_id, total, status "
    "FROM invoices "
    "WHERE id IN (" + placeholders + ") "
    "ORDER BY id ASC"
)

cur.execute(sql_text, tuple(ids))
